re-positioning of his tunneled HD line as this is also his only vascular access
He was taken directly to the intensvie care unit after his surgery.
Patient's sedation and pain was appropriately controlled with fentanyl and versed while he remained intubated
requiring increased boluses of fentanyl and versed
PO Zyprexa and Ativan were also started
librium was started for a longer acting anxiolysis
Fentanyl and Versed were weaned off.
methadone and ativan were being weaned
continued to have episodes of agitation

suicidal ideation improved with the start of eating and being in contact with his family in [**Name (NI) 651**] (via telephone). The patient's neuro status improved with an improvement in his suicidal ideations.
Patient is awake, alert, oriented and cooperative on discharge.
Esophageal balloon used to determine optimal PEEP
PEEP decreased to 5 and started a CPAP trial on POD16
Thoracic surgery was consulted for trach placement.
patient was brought to the OR by thoracic surgery
trach placement, which was subequently exchanged for a longer size
The patient was weaned to PS with trach mask trials.
He did not tolerate a Passy-Muir valve.  On [**9-17**], he tolerated trach collar all day with CPAP overnight.  The patient had episodes of tolerating trach collar and then required CPAP support
for possible desizing trach to allow for a PMV. However, since he wasn't tolerating trach collar, it was decided to not manipuate the trach
the patient had a acute desaturation episode and became agitated.
restarted on CMV with gradual improvement
The patient was bronched during this event, which showed a normal exam: all airways patent, no mucus or erythema.
tolerating intermittent trach mask but still requiring vent support when tires
TEE on [**8-8**] and [**8-9**] showed hyperdynamic with evidence of low intravascular volume.
intermittently bolused with crystallioid,albumin, and PRBCs for volume replacement
Pressors were weaned, but needed to be restarted/increased
The patient's BP stabilized and he was able to tolerate fluid removal via HD.  He has been hemodynamically stable even while off HD for past few days.
Dobhoff was placed by IR and Novasource Renal was started on [**8-12**] and advanced
increased abominal distention (noticeable at his known hernia site).
The patient was started on pureed solids and thin liquids with ensure supplements and has been tolerating them while on trach mask
Renal u/s on [**8-5**] showed patent vessels and good flow
tPa was added to HD line clotting
HD line was replaced by IR on [**8-8**]
Right groin HD catheter was replaced
Renal biopsy on [**8-16**] showed no acute rejection
renal biopsy, which was negative for rejection
with no change in urine output
Overall, his urine output continued to improve up to 400-500cc/day. With the improvement in his urine output and return to pre-op weight
He is to have his FK level checked at rehab
PTT goal 50-60 to protect the graft
received intermittent PRBCs transfusions with HD.
His HCT at discharge was stable 29.5.
on coumdain 7.5mg) and his coumadin dose was dropped to 1mg
He is to have his INR checked tomorrow AM at rehab.
blood cultures from R. femoral catheter grew GPC, coag negative Staph
Vancomycin was restarted, in addition to vanco lock in the HD line for a 14 day course.
blood cultures were drawn, which were consistently negative
Sputum culture on [**9-1**], positive for pseudomonas
valcyte was increased to 450mg three times per week
